events.title: Prevention Partnership Meeting
events.address: 50 South Main Street, West Hartford, CT
events.description: Monthly gathering of the West Hartford Prevention Partnership. Community members, partners, and interested residents are welcome to attend.

events.title: Prevention Council Meeting
events.address: 50 South Main Street, West Hartford, CT
events.description: Monthly meeting of the Prevention Council, an appointed advisory body to the West Hartford Town Council on substance misuse prevention.

events.title: Able Table Community Lunch
events.description: An Elevate WeHa Able Table community gathering. Open to all West Hartford residents. Location details to be announced — sign up for email updates to receive the address.

events.title: High-Potency Marijuana Products and Teen Mental Health
events.address: Bristow Middle School, West Hartford, CT
events.description: A community education event focused on high-potency marijuana products and their impact on teen mental health. Registration required.
